message:
Optimize git directory detection cache and suppress cross-platform dead-code warnings

Scanner thread: check known_git_dirs HashSet cache before performing
expensive filesystem stat (d3_path.join(".git").exists()), avoiding
redundant I/O on directories already identified as git repositories
in previous scan passes.

Walker module: add #[cfg_attr(not(target_os = "linux"), allow(dead_code))]
attributes to OPEN_FILES_SCAN_BUDGET, OPEN_FILES_MAX_PIDS, and
OpenPathCache which are only used on Linux targets (they depend on
/proc filesystem scanning). This eliminates dead_code warnings when
compiling on macOS without changing any runtime behavior.

- src/daemon/loop_main.rs: cache-first git dir check in nested scanner
- src/scanner/walker.rs: conditional dead_code suppression for 3 items

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
